case_title: ORONDE, KHALIPH VS SPRINT ROADSIDE SERVICE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BHATTI, PERRY INDIV. & DBA LOW PRICE TOW
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
DEFT.FILING ORDERED CONTINUANCE FOR 10/6/99 3:30PM PAID $10 CASH(CAL:20-7),FOLDER FOR COMM'S SIG.
